hero.title:
Your finances,
clearly in view
hero.subtitle: Smart Pocket tracks every account, budget, and transaction in one clean dashboard with professional reports, multi-currency support, and bank-level security.

trust.oauthEnabled: Sign in methods follow your current authentication settings

sections.aboutTitle: One app for your entire financial life
sections.aboutDescription: From daily coffee to monthly rent, every transaction, every account, and every budget stay in one place.
sections.featuresDescription: Every feature is designed around one question: does this help you understand your money better?
sections.stepsDescription: No bank connection required. Add your accounts and start tracking immediately.
sections.platformDescription: Smart Pocket is a Progressive Web App you can install on any device, use in any modern browser, and keep available offline.
sections.securityDescription: Your financial data stays protected with isolation, encryption, and privacy-first defaults.
sections.pricingDescription: Start free and upgrade only when you need more capacity or collaboration.
sections.languagesDescription: Choose English, Arabic, French, or Russian for the application UI while keeping Smart Entry input language separate.
sections.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your money?
sections.ctaDescription: Create your account, add your accounts, and start tracking income, expenses, budgets, and reports in minutes.

benefits.balanceDescription: See every account balance update the moment a transaction is recorded.
benefits.budgetAlertsDescription: Get notified when you are approaching your category budget limit.
benefits.reportsTitle: PDF and CSV reports on demand
benefits.reportsDescription: Generate professional financial statements for any date range instantly.
benefits.recurringDescription: Set up subscriptions and recurring bills once and let Smart Pocket track them.
benefits.remindersDescription: Never miss a bill. The dashboard shows what is due in the next 7 days.
benefits.rlsDescription: Your data stays private to your account and is kept separate from every other user.

features.accountsDescription: Track bank accounts, credit cards, cash, savings, and digital wallets with live balances.
features.dashboardDescription: Review income and expense trends, category spending, and net flow from one screen.
features.budgetsDescription: Create category budgets with visual progress and overspend alerts.
features.exportsDescription: Generate monthly summaries, budget performance, and income and expense breakdowns in PDF or CSV.
features.recurringDescription: Automate subscriptions, rent, and salary entries.
features.securityDescription: Private account isolation and encryption help ensure only you can access your data.

steps.createDescription: Sign up with the authentication methods currently enabled for your platform.
steps.accountsDescription: Add bank accounts, credit cards, cash, or any wallet type you want to track.
steps.transactionsDescription: Record income, expenses, and transfers, and attach receipts when needed.
steps.budgetsDescription: Create category budgets and watch your spending in real time.
steps.reportsDescription: Generate PDF or CSV reports for any period, then share or archive them.

platform.mobileDescription: Install from the browser without an app store.
platform.desktopDescription: Use the full experience in any modern browser.
platform.tabletDescription: Responsive layouts adapt cleanly to every screen size.
platform.pwaDescription: Add Smart Pocket to your home screen and keep it available offline with background sync.

security.rlsDescription: Strong access controls keep your information private and separate from other users.
security.transitDescription: All data travels over TLS without plain-text transmission.
security.restDescription: Stored data remains encrypted at the storage layer.
security.privacyDescription: Smart Pocket does not sell, share, or monetize your financial data.
security.label: Security & Privacy
security.heading: Your data stays yours
security.body: Smart Pocket uses layered security controls to keep each customer's information private and inaccessible to other users.

smartEntry.title: Smart Entry
smartEntry.description: Pay rent tomorrow and keep your food budget under control.

aiInsight.title: AI insight
aiInsight.description: Entertainment spending is rising faster than income this week.

reports.title: Professional reports, ready to share
reports.description: Generate income and expense summaries, budget performance reports, and spending breakdowns for any date range.
reports.pdfDescription: Print-ready financial statements with your branding. Share with accountants or archive for records.
reports.csvDescription: Export raw transaction data to CSV for spreadsheet analysis or accounting software import.
reports.chartsDescription: Income vs expense trends, spending by category, and budget performance are all interactive.

ai.title: Smart insights are on the roadmap
ai.description: Smart Pocket is being built with AI-ready architecture. Future releases will include intelligent spending pattern analysis, anomaly detection, and personalized financial suggestions, all running on your own data privately.

descriptions.1: Surface recurring patterns and category drift earlier.
descriptions.2: Suggest practical saving actions based on recent activity.
descriptions.3: Recommend budget adjustments before overspending grows.
descriptions.4: Highlight unusual activity and sudden spending spikes.

contact.title: Have questions? We are here.
contact.description: Whether you need help getting started, have a feature request, or want to discuss enterprise pricing, reach out and we will respond within 24 hours.

privacy.metadataDescription: Read how Smart Pocket handles your personal and financial information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: Smart Pocket stores the account, transaction, budget, and profile information you enter so the application can provide budgeting, reporting, and collaboration features.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.content: We use your data to operate the product, secure your account, respond to support requests, and improve reliability. We do not sell your financial data.

sections.title: Data Storage and Security
sections.content: Smart Pocket uses encrypted transport, protected infrastructure, and strict account-level access controls designed to keep each account's data isolated.

sections.title: Your Choices
sections.content: You can update profile details, change language preferences, and contact support about privacy questions or account-data requests at any time.

terms.metadataDescription: Read the terms that govern the use of Smart Pocket.
terms.title: Terms of Service

sections.title: Using Smart Pocket
sections.content: You may use Smart Pocket only in compliance with applicable laws and these terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

sections.title: Your Content
sections.content: You retain ownership of the financial data and notes you enter. You are responsible for making sure the information you record is accurate and lawful to store.

sections.title: Service Availability
sections.content: We work to keep Smart Pocket available and secure, but availability may vary during maintenance, upgrades, or incidents outside our control.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about these terms, please use the contact details published on the Contact page or in Platform Settings.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Smart Pocket requires an internet connection to sync your financial data. Please check your connection and try again.
offline.helper: Your data is safe and will sync when you reconnect.

aiReceiptScanner.seoTitle: AI Receipt Scanner for Everyday Expenses | Smart Pocket
aiReceiptScanner.seoDescription: Upload receipts, invoices, or bills. Smart Pocket reads the key details, prepares the expense for review, and helps you save it faster.
aiReceiptScanner.ogDescription: Use Smart Pocket to scan receipts, invoices, and bills, then review the prepared expense before saving.

hero.title: Turn receipts into ready-to-review expenses
hero.subtitle: Upload a receipt, invoice, or bill. Smart Pocket reads the key details, prepares the transaction, and lets you review everything before saving.

benefits.title: Spend less time typing
benefits.description: Merchant, date, totals, and line items are prepared for you so manual entry takes far less effort.

benefits.title: Review before anything is saved
benefits.description: You stay in control with a review step before the expense reaches your records.

benefits.title: Keep the source with the transaction
benefits.description: Attach the receipt to the expense so it is easier to check later.

howItWorks.title: Upload a receipt or bill
howItWorks.description: Add a clear image or PDF from your phone or computer.

howItWorks.title: Let Smart Pocket prepare the details
howItWorks.description: AI reads the document and fills in the main expense information for you.

howItWorks.title: Review and save
howItWorks.description: Check the prepared details, adjust anything you want, then save with confidence.

useCases.title: Daily spending
useCases.description: Capture groceries, fuel, coffee, and other everyday purchases without backlogging receipts.

useCases.title: Bills and invoices
useCases.description: Track utility bills, service invoices, and other one-off documents in one place.

useCases.title: Travel expenses
useCases.description: Save hotel, taxi, dining, and airport receipts while the details are still fresh.

faqs.question: Does Smart Pocket save the receipt automatically?
faqs.answer: No. Smart Pocket prepares the details for review first, and you choose whether to save them.

faqs.question: Can I upload PDFs as well as images?
faqs.answer: Yes. Clear images and supported PDF files can both be used for receipt review.

faqs.question: Is receipt reading unlimited?
faqs.answer: Receipt Intelligence availability and usage limits may vary by plan allowance.

aiVoiceExpenseTracker.seoTitle: AI Voice Expense Tracker for Fast Daily Logging | Smart Pocket
aiVoiceExpenseTracker.seoDescription: Speak your spending naturally. Smart Pocket prepares the transaction for review so you can save expenses faster with less typing.
aiVoiceExpenseTracker.ogTitle: AI Voice Expense Tracker | Smart Pocket
aiVoiceExpenseTracker.ogDescription: Use voice to prepare expenses in Smart Pocket, then review and save the transaction in a few taps.

hero.title: Speak the expense and review the result
hero.subtitle: Tell Smart Pocket what happened in plain language. It prepares the transaction, account, and category details so you can review and save quickly.

benefits.title: Log spending while you move
benefits.description: Capture expenses after shopping, commuting, or dining without opening a full form first.

benefits.title: Keep it natural
benefits.description: Say what happened in everyday words instead of memorizing a strict format.

benefits.title: Stay in control
benefits.description: Review the prepared transaction before it is added to your records.

howItWorks.title: Speak your transaction
howItWorks.description: Record a short voice note about what you spent or received.

howItWorks.title: Let Smart Pocket prepare the draft
howItWorks.description: The app turns your words into a transaction draft with the main details filled in.

howItWorks.title: Confirm and save
howItWorks.description: Review the draft, correct anything you need, and save when it looks right.

useCases.title: Busy weekdays
useCases.description: Record spending quickly between meetings, school runs, and errands.

useCases.title: On-the-go tracking
useCases.description: Add expenses while walking, driving, or travelling without typing long notes.

useCases.title: Quick income notes
useCases.description: Capture transfers in, side income, and other money events as soon as they happen.

faqs.question: Do I still review the transaction?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket prepares the draft, and you review it before saving.

faqs.question: Can I use text instead of voice?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Entry also supports typed text when speaking is not convenient.

faqs.question: Is voice entry included in every plan?
faqs.answer: AI usage allowances may vary by plan, so available voice requests can depend on your subscription.

familyBudgetApp.seoTitle: Family Budget App for Household Money Clarity | Smart Pocket
familyBudgetApp.seoDescription: Manage family spending, bills, subscriptions, budgets, and shared money in one simple app built for everyday households.
familyBudgetApp.ogDescription: Track household money, bills, subscriptions, and everyday family spending in one clear place.

hero.title: Keep family money simpler every week
hero.subtitle: Smart Pocket brings household spending, budgets, bills, subscriptions, and shared responsibilities into one clear view for everyday decisions.

benefits.title: See the full household picture
benefits.description: Bring accounts, spending, recurring bills, and budget targets together in one app.

benefits.title: Reduce money guesswork
benefits.description: Know where the month stands before the next bill or shopping trip arrives.

benefits.title: Keep routines easier to manage
benefits.description: Track the regular payments and everyday costs that shape family life.

howItWorks.title: Set up your main accounts and categories
howItWorks.description: Start with the accounts and spending areas your household uses most.

howItWorks.title: Track spending, bills, and subscriptions
howItWorks.description: Add everyday transactions and keep recurring costs visible in one place.

howItWorks.title: Review your budget progress
howItWorks.description: Use the dashboard and reports to understand where your money is going.

useCases.title: Monthly household planning
useCases.description: Stay on top of rent, groceries, transport, school costs, and home bills.

useCases.title: Shared family responsibilities
useCases.description: Track who paid, what is due, and how regular costs are changing.

useCases.title: Subscription control
useCases.description: Keep streaming, phone, software, and family memberships visible instead of scattered.

faqs.question: Is Smart Pocket only for strict budgets?
faqs.answer: No. You can use it for light tracking or for a more detailed family budgeting routine.

faqs.question: Can I track recurring household costs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket helps you stay on top of subscriptions, bills, and recurring expenses.

faqs.question: Does it work if family spending is shared?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket includes shared expense and reimbursement workflows for common family money situations.

sharedExpenses.seoTitle: Shared Expense Tracker and Reimbursement App | Smart Pocket
sharedExpenses.seoDescription: Track who paid, who owes, reimbursements, and settlements in one place so shared money stays clear and organized.
sharedExpenses.ogDescription: Track shared spending, reimbursements, and settlements without messy notes or confusion.

hero.title: Track shared money without the confusion
hero.subtitle: From dinners and rent to group purchases and reimbursements, Smart Pocket helps you see who paid, who owes, and what still needs to be settled.

benefits.title: Know who covered each cost
benefits.description: Keep a clean record of shared purchases instead of relying on memory or chat messages.

benefits.title: Follow reimbursements clearly
benefits.description: Track what has been repaid, what is still pending, and what needs a reminder.

benefits.title: Reduce awkward money follow-ups
benefits.description: Use one shared system to remove uncertainty around balances and settlements.

howItWorks.title: Add a shared expense
howItWorks.description: Record the amount, who paid, and who should share the cost.

howItWorks.title: Review the split
howItWorks.description: Check how the amount should be shared before saving the transaction.

howItWorks.title: Track repayment and settlement
howItWorks.description: Follow reimbursements and close the loop when balances are settled.

useCases.title: Couples and households
useCases.description: Manage groceries, utility bills, transport, and home purchases across shared routines.

useCases.title: Trips and weekends away
useCases.description: Track shared hotels, meals, transport, and tickets while everyone is still together.

useCases.title: Friends and flatmates
useCases.description: Keep shared spending clear for rent, supplies, and everyday group purchases.

faqs.question: Can I see who still owes money?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket keeps shared expenses and reimbursements visible so pending balances are easier to understand.

faqs.question: Do I have to split every expense equally?
faqs.answer: No. Shared expense workflows can be reviewed so the final split matches the real situation.

faqs.question: Can shared expenses live beside personal spending?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket keeps your overall money view in one place while still handling shared scenarios.

multiCurrencyExpenseTracker.seoTitle: Multi-Currency Expense Tracker for Expats and Travellers | Smart Pocket
multiCurrencyExpenseTracker.seoDescription: Track spending across accounts and currencies with one app built for expats, travellers, freelancers, and international families.
multiCurrencyExpenseTracker.ogDescription: Manage expenses across currencies and accounts with one clear personal finance app.

hero.title: Track money across currencies without losing clarity
hero.subtitle: Smart Pocket helps you follow spending across accounts and currencies so daily tracking stays practical for expats, travellers, and international households.

benefits.title: Keep accounts in their real currencies
benefits.description: Follow each account in the currency it actually uses instead of forcing everything into one manual sheet.

benefits.title: Stay organized while moving between countries
benefits.description: Track everyday spending even when your money is split across banks, cards, and cash.

benefits.title: See the bigger picture
benefits.description: Review spending patterns and balances without losing the original currency context.

howItWorks.title: Add your accounts and currencies
howItWorks.description: Set up the cards, wallets, and bank accounts you actually use.

howItWorks.title: Track transactions in the original currency
howItWorks.description: Keep expenses and income tied to the right account and currency.

howItWorks.title: Review your dashboard and reports
howItWorks.description: Understand totals and spending trends while still keeping the original currency context available.

useCases.title: Expats
useCases.description: Track life across home-country accounts, local cards, and travel spending.

useCases.title: Freelancers with international clients
useCases.description: Keep incoming payments and outgoing expenses organized across different currencies.

useCases.title: Frequent travellers
useCases.description: Capture spending in the currency you paid without losing track later.

faqs.question: Can I keep the original currency on each transaction?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket is designed to keep the original currency context visible for your records.

faqs.question: Is it useful if I only use two currencies?
faqs.answer: Yes. It works whether you use two currencies or many more across different accounts.

faqs.question: Does Smart Pocket only work for expats?
faqs.answer: No. It also suits travellers, freelancers, and families who move money across currencies.

expenseTrackerUae.seoDescription: Track expenses, budgets, receipts, subscriptions, and shared money in AED and other currencies with one clear personal finance app.
expenseTrackerUae.ogDescription: Use Smart Pocket as an AED-friendly expense tracker for budgets, receipts, subscriptions, and shared expenses.

hero.title: A practical expense tracker for life in the UAE
hero.subtitle: Track daily spending, budgets, subscriptions, receipts, and shared money in AED and other currencies with one simple app.

benefits.title: Made for everyday AED tracking
benefits.description: Keep your usual spending, bills, and routine money decisions in one easy place.

benefits.title: Useful for mixed-currency life
benefits.description: Track AED alongside other currencies when work, travel, or family needs cross borders.

benefits.title: Simple enough for daily use
benefits.description: Use AI-assisted receipt and Smart Entry tools when you want speed, while keeping review in your hands.

howItWorks.title: Set up your main accounts
howItWorks.description: Start with the bank accounts, cards, cash, and wallets you use most.

howItWorks.title: Track expenses your way
howItWorks.description: Use manual entry, Smart Entry, or receipt review based on what is fastest for the moment.

howItWorks.title: Monitor budgets and recurring costs
howItWorks.description: Stay on top of subscriptions, bills, and monthly spending habits.

useCases.title: Residents managing daily costs
useCases.description: Follow groceries, transport, rent, schooling, and household bills with less friction.

useCases.title: Professionals with mixed currencies
useCases.description: Handle AED spending while also keeping visibility over other currencies.

useCases.title: Families and shared households

faqs.question: Can I use Smart Pocket for AED tracking?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket supports AED alongside other supported currencies.

faqs.question: Does it help with receipts and subscriptions too?
faqs.answer: Yes. Smart Pocket includes receipt review, recurring tracking, and subscription visibility based on your plan features.

faqs.question: Is it only for UAE users?
faqs.answer: No. It is useful for anyone, but this page focuses on common personal finance needs in the UAE.
